roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/CAL:SENTENCE/X:THE PEOPLE INDICATE THAT A STATE PRISON SENTENCE IS NOT APPROPRIATE IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE DUE TO THE WILLINGNESS OF THE DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE HER REQUIREMENTS FOR A GED, THE COURT AGREES,/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 293D   /CTS:293/DNACOMP/WS/11590/DTC/LFNEW/RX/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/LF/SAORD/SA2:INTERSECTION OF TURK AND LEAVENWORTH STREETS IN SF/CTORD:AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION, THE DEFENDANT TO ENTER AND COMPLETE A WOMENSRE-ENTRY PROGRAM MONITORED THRU PRETRIAL DIVERSION/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TOREPORT TO APD ON 9-15-11 BETWEEN 9AM TO 12NOON/PROBFINE/SECFEE40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/TEXT/PB/CONTD:GRADUATION RPT AND PTD PROGRESS RPT(DAW)/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:DEFENDANT 4011,5 TODAY/X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE FOR CONTINUANCE/BAIL:65,000/CONTD:INSTRUCTION AND ARRAIGNMENT;AND PLEA; AND FILE MTR'S/DOP/
/CAL:GRADUATION REPORT AND PTD PROGRESS REPORT, DAW/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:THE DEFENDANT IS PROGRAM COMPLIANT  /
/CAL:PRELIM HRG/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:2/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:02-25-11/REMA/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/STWPX/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/987,2/BAIL:65,000/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
